---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what do you want this tool to do that it doesn't do today? -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- What gap in your red team workflow does this address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like it to work? Include example commands if relevant -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Links to similar tools, research, or anything else that helps -->
